title: Buldapest
description: Buldapest is a Minecraft Vanilla Client gameplay based modpack on Fabric Modloader. Compatible with every Minecraft Vanilla server and realm. Includes performanace boost and visual enhancement additions to Vanilla Minecraft and more.
body:
## About Buldapest
Buldapest is the only modpack for Minecraft Vanilla Client gameplay you will ever need. Compatible with almost every Minecraft Vanilla server and realm. It includes many additions to Vanilla Minecraft like Performance Boost, Chunk Rendering, Entity handling and visual enhancements like Minimap, Worldmap, 3D Models, Shaders, Resource Packs and more. So get ready to experience the best possible Vanilla Minecraft gameplay you ever had and will have.

More performance boosting and visual enhancement mods will follow in the near future. Feel free to suggest any mods that would fit perfectly into the modpack on discord.

## Discord, Wiki & Support
Discord server with wiki, precise versionbased modlist, ticketing etc. will be updated from time to time. Invite to the discord is on the left side in the External resources section. If you have any questions feel free to post them in the discord.

Stay tuned. 

### All Mods/Ressource Packs/Shaders of the newest Buldapest Version
_For a more detailed or version based list please refer to the wiki on the discord._
